name: 12q13_KRT_keratin_cluster
description: 12q13.13 type II keratin gene cluster (KRT1-KRT8, hair keratins KRT81-KRT86 plus KRTAPs). ~25 tandemly arrayed paralogs in ~700 kb at 60-95% identity; shares duplicons with the type I keratin cluster on 17q21.

architecture.internal_structure: ~25 keratin coding genes in tandem; coding-region homology 60-95%; intergenic SD modules of 3-15 kb; hair keratin sub-cluster KRT81-KRT86 at distal end.
